## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] If I added a translation → all keys from `messages/en/common.json` are present in my file
- [ ] If I changed AI prompts → I tested output in at least 2 languages
- [ ] If I changed immigration facts → I've linked an official source below
- [ ] No `.env` or API keys were committed
